evidence: Hermes Agent listed in New Agent adapter type dropdown (screenshot: adapter-type-dropdown.png)
Hermes Agent card shown in onboarding harness selector step 3 (screenshot: onboarding-step3-harness.png)
CEO agent persists adapter_type='hermes' in Supabase (query: agents.adapter_type)
Toast confirms 'Adapter updated to Hermes Agent' during onboarding
Hermes config exposes: Model (Claude Opus 4.6), Provider (Auto-detect), Toolsets (7 checkboxes), Memory Mode, MCP Servers (Add Server), Max Turns (screenshot: hermes-config-new-agent.png)
Saved adapter_config contains {goals, system_prompt, operational_parameters} with non-empty structure (query: agents.adapter_config)
CEO agent created via onboarding has Hermes config with valid adapter_config JSON (screenshot: ceo-agent-detail.png)
Agent status is 'idle' — immediately usable (not blocked)
Adapter config includes operational_parameters with authority_level=autonomous
adapterRegistry.has('hermes') returns true (src/adapters/registry.ts confirms hermesUIAdapter registration)
Agent detail resolves label 'Hermes Agent' through adapterRegistry.get('hermes').label
Agent list page shows 'Hermes Agent' for CEO agents (screenshot: agents page)
Test file hermes-adapter.test.ts verifies registry resolution
Integrations page shows Composio card with 'MCP Tools' label, 'Disconnected' status, Configure button (screenshot: integrations-page.png)
Configure dialog exposes: Consumer Key, MCP Server URL, Composio Tools section, link to dashboard.composio.dev (screenshot: composio-config.png)
OpenClaw Gateway config shows 'Composio Tools' section with message 'Enable Composio on the Integrations page to select external tools for this agent' (screenshot: openclaw-config.png)
Composio integration is not configured with real API key — tool selection cannot be tested
issues: Composio requires real API credentials to test tool selection persistence. The UI path exists but cannot be exercised without a configured Composio integration.

issues: Cannot verify downstream tool availability without a connected Composio integration with real API key
